attributes.action: Launch a formal investigation into misogyny in the Family Courts’ rulings.
attributes.background: I would like the government to perform a thorough audit of child arrangement proceedings and with reference to the full body of evidence, not facts and reasons documents, determine if there is systematic misogyny in Family Court decisions in the Uk re. Work and living arrangements & domestic abuse

rejection.details:
We are not clear what action you are seeking from the UK Government or Parliament. You can start a new petition setting out more clearly what you would like the UK Government or Parliament to do.

You may wish to sign this petition on a similar topic:
'Hold public inquiry on safeguarding system and training in family courts'
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/751418
